name: Drone Flight Time Calculator
description: Estimate how long your drone can fly based on battery capacity, voltage, and system efficiency.
formulaDescription: Flight time is energy (Capacity * Voltage * Efficiency * Usable Fraction) divided by Power draw.

example.explanation: At 5000mAh and 11.1V with 85% efficiency and 80% discharge, you have 37.74Wh usable energy. At 100W draw, ideal time is 22.6min, real-world is lower due to aerodynamic losses.

faqs.question: Why is real-world flight time lower?
faqs.answer: Ideal time only considers battery capacity and static power. Real-world flight involves acceleration, wind, and aerodynamic drag, which consume more energy.

faqs.question: What's a safe battery discharge level?
faqs.answer: It is recommended to discharge LiPo batteries only to about 20% (80% used) to preserve battery health and prevent crashes.

concept: Flight time depends on the total energy stored in the battery and how quickly it is consumed by the motors and electronics.
guideSteps: Enter your battery's total capacity in milliamp-hours (mAh).
Enter the nominal voltage of the battery pack.
Estimate your drone's average power consumption during flight.
The calculator will provide both ideal and adjusted real-world flight estimates.
